description_long: This is a round, shallow plant pot with a wide rim and a single small handle on one side. The exterior is decorated with intricate geometric patterns and stylized human figures, rendered in earthy tones of brown, cream, and black. The rim features a repeating motif of small, dark chevrons, while the body alternates between panels of geometric designs and panels with human figures holding what appear to be stalks or branches. The interior is a deep reddish-brown, unadorned and smooth, suggesting it is made from fired clay or ceramic. The pot's overall appearance is rustic and artisanal, reminiscent of traditional or indigenous pottery. Its size and shape make it suitable for holding a small to medium plant, and it would likely be used as a decorative piece in an outdoor or semi-outdoor setting.
description: A shallow, round plant pot with a wide rim, single handle, and intricate geometric and human figure motifs in earthy tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing a panel with a human figure and plant motifs, bordered by geometric patterns and the wide rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the single handle and a continuous band of geometric patterns around the pot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying geometric motifs and a plain section of the rim, with no visible handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring another human figure panel and the handle, with decorative chevrons on the rim.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in rustic gardens or traditional outdoor courtyards
attribute_decorative_pattern: geometric and human figure motifs with chevron rim
